sentences.en: Our organic search traffic has plateaued — we need to invest in content marketing.
sentences.zh: 我们的自然搜索流量已经见顶——需要加大内容营销投入。

sentences.en: The conversion rate from trial to paid dropped 5% after the pricing change.
sentences.zh: 调价后，从试用到付费的转化率下降了5%。

sentences.en: Retargeting ads brought back 12% of users who abandoned the sign-up process.
sentences.zh: 再营销广告带回了12%放弃注册流程的用户。

sentences.en: We should segment users by behavior rather than demographics for this campaign.
sentences.zh: 这次活动我们应该按行为而不是人口统计来分群。

sentences.en: The viral coefficient exceeded 1.0 for the first time this month.
sentences.zh: 病毒系数本月首次超过1.0。

example.en: User growth has plateaued after the initial launch spike.
example.zh: 初期上线高峰过后，用户增长已趋于平稳。

example.en: Improving the checkout flow increased conversion by 20%.
example.zh: 优化结账流程使转化率提升了20%。

example.en: Retargeting campaigns typically have a higher ROI than cold acquisition.
example.zh: 再营销广告通常比冷启动获客的投资回报率更高。

example.en: We segmented users into three tiers based on trading frequency.
example.zh: 我们根据交易频率将用户分为三个层级。

example.en: A viral coefficient above 1.0 means each user brings in more than one new user.
example.zh: 病毒系数超过1.0意味着每个用户能带来一个以上的新用户。

sentences.en: We need to define success metrics before launching the experiment.
sentences.zh: 在启动实验之前，我们需要先定义成功指标。

sentences.en: The p95 latency spiked to 800ms during the morning trading session.
sentences.zh: 早盘交易时段，P95延迟飙升到了800毫秒。

sentences.en: User feedback indicates the portfolio page is too cluttered.
sentences.zh: 用户反馈显示持仓页面过于杂乱。

sentences.en: We shipped the dark mode feature two sprints ahead of schedule.
sentences.zh: 我们比计划提前两个冲刺交付了暗黑模式功能。

sentences.en: The crash rate on Android 14 is three times higher than on other versions.
sentences.zh: Android 14上的崩溃率是其他版本的三倍。

example.en: High latency in the order execution flow leads to user complaints.
example.zh: 下单执行流程中的高延迟导致用户投诉。

example.en: A cluttered interface overwhelms new users and increases bounce rate.
example.zh: 杂乱的界面会让新用户不知所措，增加跳出率。

example.en: Each sprint lasts two weeks and ends with a demo to stakeholders.
example.zh: 每个冲刺持续两周，结束时向利益相关方演示。

example.en: Keeping the crash rate below 0.1% is a key stability target.
example.zh: 将崩溃率控制在0.1%以下是关键的稳定性目标。

example.en: We ran an experiment to test whether push notifications improve retention.
example.zh: 我们做了一个实验来测试推送通知是否能提升留存。

sentences.en: EBITDA grew 25% year over year, indicating strong operational efficiency.
sentences.zh: EBITDA同比增长25%，显示出强劲的运营效率。

sentences.en: The company initiated a $500 million share buyback program.
sentences.zh: 公司启动了一项5亿美元的股票回购计划。

sentences.en: Free cash flow turned positive for the first time since the IPO.
sentences.zh: 自上市以来，自由现金流首次转正。

sentences.en: The bond yield curve inverted again, raising recession concerns.
sentences.zh: 债券收益率曲线再次倒挂，引发了衰退担忧。

sentences.en: Earnings per share came in at $1.25, beating the street estimate of $1.10.
sentences.zh: 每股收益为1.25美元，超过华尔街预期的1.10美元。

example.en: EBITDA is often used to compare profitability across companies.
example.zh: EBITDA常被用来比较不同公司间的盈利能力。

example.en: Share buybacks reduce the outstanding share count and boost EPS.
example.zh: 股票回购减少了流通股数量，提升了每股收益。

example.en: Positive free cash flow allows the company to fund growth without new debt.
example.zh: 正的自由现金流使公司无需新增债务即可为增长提供资金。

example.en: An inverted yield curve has historically been a recession predictor.
example.zh: 收益率曲线倒挂在历史上一直是衰退的预测信号。

example.en: Analysts revised EPS estimates upward after the strong Q1 report.
example.zh: 在强劲的Q1报告后，分析师上调了每股收益预期。

sentences.en: I would like to promote her to team lead — she has consistently exceeded expectations.
sentences.zh: 我想提拔她为团队负责人——她一直超出预期。

sentences.en: We need to hire two senior engineers to unblock the infrastructure workstream.
sentences.zh: 我们需要招两名高级工程师来解除基础设施工作流的阻塞。

sentences.en: The employee satisfaction survey revealed concerns about work-life balance.
sentences.zh: 员工满意度调查揭示了工作与生活平衡方面的担忧。

sentences.en: Let us set up a weekly sync to keep all stakeholders in the loop.
sentences.zh: 我们建立一个每周同步会，让所有利益相关方保持信息同步。

sentences.en: Delegating this project to the junior team will be a great growth opportunity.
sentences.zh: 把这个项目委派给初级团队将是一个很好的成长机会。

example.en: She was promoted to VP after leading the product turnaround.
example.zh: 在领导产品扭亏后，她被提升为副总裁。

example.en: The CTO stepped in to unblock the dependency issue between teams.
example.zh: CTO介入解决了团队间的依赖阻塞问题。

example.en: All stakeholders must approve the budget before we proceed.
example.zh: 在我们继续之前，所有利益相关方必须批准预算。

example.en: Good managers delegate tasks while retaining accountability.
example.zh: 好的管理者委派任务的同时保留问责权。

example.en: The company introduced flexible hours to improve work-life balance.
example.zh: 公司引入了弹性工时以改善工作与生活平衡。

sentences.en: Our moat is the proprietary data we have accumulated over five years.
sentences.zh: 我们的护城河是过去五年积累的独有数据。

sentences.en: The board approved a three-year strategic plan focused on vertical integration.
sentences.zh: 董事会批准了一项聚焦垂直整合的三年战略计划。

sentences.en: We should pursue a land-and-expand strategy with enterprise clients.
sentences.zh: 我们应该对企业客户采用先切入再扩展的策略。

sentences.en: Market saturation in Tier 1 cities forces us to look at lower-tier markets.
sentences.zh: 一线城市的市场饱和迫使我们转向下沉市场。

sentences.en: The merger will create synergies worth an estimated $300 million annually.
sentences.zh: 合并预计每年将产生价值3亿美元的协同效应。

example.en: Brand recognition serves as a powerful moat against new entrants.
example.zh: 品牌认知度是抵御新进入者的强大护城河。

example.en: Vertical integration helped the company control costs across the supply chain.
example.zh: 垂直整合帮助公司在整个供应链中控制成本。

example.en: The land-and-expand model starts with a small deal and grows over time.
example.zh: 先切入再扩展的模式从小订单起步，随时间逐步增长。

example.en: Market saturation means growth must come from taking competitors' share.
example.zh: 市场饱和意味着增长必须来自抢夺竞争对手的份额。

example.en: The acquisition created cost synergies by consolidating back-office operations.
example.zh: 此次收购通过整合后台运营创造了成本协同效应。
